contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Pointed.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Pointed.

(** ** Encode-decode method of characterizing identity types *)

(** See Homotopy/IdentitySystems.v for a related characterization of identity types. *)

Definition encode_decode
  (A : Type) (a0 : A) (code : A -> Type)
  (c0 : code a0) (decode : forall x, code x -> a0 = x)
  (s : forall (c : code a0), decode _ c # c0 = c)
  (r : decode _ c0 = idpath) (a1 : A)
  : a0 = a1 <~> code a1.

hypotheses.type: forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c

goals.conclusion: (fun p : a0 = a1 => transport code p c0) o decode a1 == idmap

hypotheses.type: forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c

goals.conclusion: transport code (decode a1 p) c0 = p

hypotheses.type: forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c

goals.conclusion: transport code (decode a0 p) c0 = p

hypotheses.type: forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c

goals.conclusion: decode a1 o (fun p : a0 = a1 => transport code p c0) == idmap

hypotheses.type: forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c
forall x : A, code x -> a0 = x
forall c : code a0, transport code (decode a0 c) c0 = c

contents:
Definition encode_decode_trunc n
  (A : Type) (a0 : A) (code : A -> Type) `{forall a, IsTrunc n (code a)}
  (c0 : code a0) (decode : forall x, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x))
  (s : forall (c : code a0), Trunc_rec (fun p => p # c0) (decode _ c) = c)
  (r : decode _ c0 = tr idpath) (a1 : A)
  : Tr n (a0 = a1) <~> code a1.

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c
forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a1 => transport code p c0) o decode a1 == idmap

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a1 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a1 p) = p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a1 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a1 p) = p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a1 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a1 p) = p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a1 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a1 p) = p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 p) = p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: decode a1 o Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a1 => transport code p c0) == idmap

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: decode a1 (Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a1 => transport code p0 c0) p) = p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion:
decode a1 (Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a1 => transport code p0 c0) (tr p)) =
tr p

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p0 : a0 = a0 => transport code p0 c0) (decode a0 c) = c

goals.conclusion: decode a0 (Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (tr 1)) = tr 1

hypotheses.type: forall a : A, IsTrunc n (code a)
forall x : A, code x -> Tr n (a0 = x)

forall c : code a0,
Trunc_rec (fun p : a0 = a0 => transport code p c0) (decode a0 c) = c

contents:
Definition encode_decode_loops
  (A : pType) (code : pFam A)
  (decode : forall x, code x -> point A = x)
  (s : forall (c : code (point A)), decode _ c # (dpoint code) = c)
  (r : decode _ (dpoint code) = idpath)
  : loops A <~> code (point A)
  := encode_decode _ _ code (dpoint code) decode s r _.

Definition encode_decode_trunc_loops n
  (A : pType) (code : pFam A) `{forall a, IsTrunc n (code a)}
  (decode : forall x, code x -> Tr n (point A = x))
  (s : forall (c : code (point A)),
    Trunc_rec (fun (p : loops A) => p # (dpoint code)) (decode _ c) = c)
  (r : decode _ (dpoint code) = tr idpath)
  : pTr n (loops A) <~> code (point A)
  := encode_decode_trunc _ _ _ code (dpoint code) decode s r _.
